***Taihou-Class Ship, Aircraft Carrier, Sakura Empire Aligned***

[info for the people who don't know anyth about her fr fr]

-Taihou is a aircraft carrier class ship that aligns herself with The Sakura Empire. She is one of the newest type of aircraft carriers that was created to carry larger newer-model carrier planes still under development at the time of her construction. While not high-ranking, Taihou is still a notable ship among The Sakura Empire and installs fear into many Ships -
